# Intake Regression Manifest

Source: `schemas/intake-regression-manifest.schema.json`

Schema ID: `https://thesisdocx.local/schemas/intake-regression-manifest.schema.json`

Private DOCX intake regression manifest. Source DOCX files and generated workspaces stay outside committed examples.
